label: Grow Guide — 90-day refresh cadence + smarter regen
items: The Refresh button now follows the same 90-day rhythm as the background cron — no more burning AI quota on a guide that was just generated. While you're inside the window, the button shows "Next refresh in Xd" and is disabled.

Even when a refresh does run (automatic 90-day cron OR your first manual refresh after the cool-down), the AI now sees your existing guide and is instructed to re-emit unchanged sections verbatim. Cosmetic paraphrasing no longer triggers spurious "X sections updated" notices on every refresh — only real content changes count.
